criteria.reason: Retry lineage is persisted in new reservation metadata and exposed through refresh billing state.
The web Operator renders linked retry attempts and immediately checks the newly queued job.
The old job remains untouched and no provider write path is introduced.
Targeted py_compile, pytest, frontend build, and diff checks passed.

commands_run: python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_map_refresh.py src/services/operator_refresh_retry.py src/services/operator_refresh_result.py src/api/operator_api.py
PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_retry.py tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py
